name: Easy Roasted Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Anchovy paste (or ½ tsp salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the peppers into strips, about 1/3 inch wide.
2. Drain in a colander.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the garlic, shallots, pepper, thyme, mustard, anchovy paste and vinegar. Stir well to blend.
4. Slowly whisk in the olive oil in a slow stream until emulsified.
5. Stir in the peppers.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
7. Remove from the refrigerator 1 hour before serving.
